statement.p: A rectangles length is 10 feet shorter than 3 \text{ times} its width. If we use w to represent the rectangles width, use a polynomial to represent the rectangles area in expanded form.

solution.p: The rectangles width is w feet. Since the rectangles length is 10 feet shorter than 3 \text{ times} its width, its length is 3w-10 feet. A rectangles area formula is:
The rectangles area is {3w^{2}-10w} square feet.
